---
title: "Experiments"
description: "Personal projects, learning experiments, and weekend builds."
listing:
  contents: "projects/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: false
  include:
    categories: "Personal"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.eyebrow}
§ Personal · Outside the day job
:::

Side projects, weekend builds, and things I make to learn something new —
generative models, retro computing, game development, agentic AI experiments,
and the homelab work that supports it all.

For professional work, see [Work](projects.qmd).
